today.mood: Overcast but warm—perfect for street food crawls and indoor food courts. Humidity dropping, breeze picking up.
today.best_time_to_go_out: Now until 6PM for daylight content; after 7PM for neon-lit street food scenes
today.summary: Overcast clouds, 28°C, 35% humidity, light breeze. Good visibility. No rain expected. Transit running normally. Ideal for food vlogging and hawker hopping.

weather.advisory: Light winds, low humidity—ideal outdoor filming. No rain risk.

finance.plain_english: Ringgit holding steady. USD at 4.01 MYR. Bitcoin at USD 60.5K. Fuel unchanged at RM 2.05/L—good day for road trips and Grab rides.

ui.alert: Sunset at 6:40 PM—plan indoor dining after. Light winds, zero rain risk.

news.title: RON95 Fuel Unchanged at RM 2.05/L—Stable Week Ahead
news.transport: No change to Grab/taxi pricing; steady fuel costs
news.plain_english: Fuel prices stable at RM 2.05 per liter. Grab rides won't spike. Good day for road trips & food crawls.

news.title: Sunset at 6:40 PM—Plan Indoor Dining After Dark
news.who: Content creators, photographers, outdoor event planners
news.plain_english: Sun sets at 6:40 PM sharp. If you're filming outdoors, wrap by 6:30 PM for golden hour. After 7 PM, neon-lit venues are your play.

transit.verdict: Smooth—standard Friday evening crowd, no delays expected
Expect +5–10 min delays; proceed with caution during peak 6–8 PM
Good—light Friday evening load, on-time service expected
Moderate Friday evening rush expected; trains running on schedule
Available but +20–30% surge pricing likely 6–8 PM. Book early or use LRT.

hike.verdict: Trails accessible until 6:40 PM (sunset). NOT RECOMMENDED after sunset—dense jungle, no lighting, safety risk. Close all trails by 6:30 PM user deadline.

trails.why: Urban trail, short duration, golden hour views of city skyline from summit. Not recommended after dark—limited lighting.
Local jogging loop, peaceful canopy, overcast day reduces sun intensity. NOT recommended after 6:40 PM—jungle darkness.
Manicured garden walk, low-intensity, light breeze ideal. CLOSES 6 PM sharp—no evening access.

trails.status: OPEN NOW, but NOT recommended—return before 6 PM
trails.why: Longer trail requiring early-morning start. Given sunset at 6:40 PM, hiking time is SEVERELY LIMITED. Recommend skip today—not enough daylight remaining for safe return.
Dense jungle, slippery rocks, remote location. Zero tolerance for post-sunset hiking—dangerous terrain, no signage, animal activity increases after dark.

escape.vibe: Theme park, cool mountain air, night entertainment, casino
escape.why_now: Overcast weather perfect for outdoor rides. No sun glare. Cable car views through clouds. Evening shows & dining at 8 PM.

escape.vibe: Lake views, architectural photography, government gardens, sunset reflection
escape.why_now: Golden hour 5:30–6:40 PM ideal for mosque pink reflection shots & waterfront walks. Calm lake, minimal crowds Friday evening.

escape.why_now: Overcast reduces cave heat. Golden-hour light through cave entrance creates dramatic silhouettes. Evening prayer time (6:30 PM) adds cultural texture.

escape.why_now: Sunset at 6:40 PM prime—bring food & blanket for golden-hour lakeside shoot. Low humidity ideal for outdoor picnicking.

escape.vibe: Nature reserve, firefly boat tours (night only), mangrove wetlands, bird watching

warnings: Sunset at 6:40 PM—all outdoor activities MUST close by 6:30 PM for safety. Hiking trails are time-limited.

Petaling Street full pedestrianization 6 PM–midnight—no vehicle access, but foot traffic optimal for food vlogging.
